title: Book of Jubilees: The Little Genesis
description: The Book of Jubilees retells Genesis and Exodus with a 364-day solar calendar and detailed angelology. Canonical in the Ethiopian Church.
introduction: The Book of Jubilees retells Genesis and Exodus with a 364-day solar calendar and detailed angelology. Canonical in the Ethiopian Church.

translation.text: This is the history of the division of the days of the law and of the testimony, of the events of the years, of their weeks, of their jubilees throughout all the years of the world.
